category_sources: Official GitHub README says Pelikan is Twitter's framework for developing cache services.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is Pelikan.
docs_sources: Official README is also the project documentation surface.
Official README says current documentation material is under the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README describes cache-service products including memcached-like server and lists Rust/C codebase.
